message:
feat: Implement comptime wrapper C function call generation

comptime_wrapper.zig:
- inferFunctionType: Build C function pointer type from spec at comptime
- comptimeGenerateWrapper: Use @extern to get C function pointer,
  @call to invoke with marshaled arguments
- Supports both explicit c_func_ptr and inferred function types

This enables automatic Python→C wrapper generation for any C function.

Reduces TODO count from 8 to 7 (1 eliminated).
